# x-twitter-scraper_x_media (Resource)

Media upload & download



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account` (String) X account (@username or account ID)
- `file` (String) Media file to upload

### Optional

- `is_long_video` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `media_id` (String)
- `success` (Boolean)
